body:
SD-022-gql-svelte-migration.md legitimately contains ~14 matches for react/vite/tanstack/minisearch that are NOT stale references.

They are ALL either (a) historical framing ("migrating FROM the React stack") or (b) deletion-target table rows naming what to remove. The doc is the migration north-star and needs to reference the old stack to describe what is being replaced.

When running the grep sweep for this bead, include SD-022 in the expected-match set:
grep -riE "(react|vite|tanstack|minisearch)" ... | grep -v SD-022-gql-svelte-migration.md

Or classify any SD-022 match as category (a) historical-OK in the completion note.

Per opus review of dfd4af5 commit: these matches were reviewed and approved.
source: allowlist note from SD-022 opus review
summary: Allowlist SD-022 intentional historical refs when running the spec sweep

body:
Opus review of 9aad939 against the Stage 1.13 acceptance.

WHAT THE SWEEP DID:
Commit 9aad939 fixed two legitimate category (c) stale references in docs/helix/06-iterate/alignment-reviews/AR-2026-04-10-repo.md (Intent Summary claim about ADR-002 Playwright harness + Implementation Map claim about React/Vite SPA). Both fixes are surgical and correct.

WHAT THE SWEEP MISSED:
1. docs/helix/01-frame/concerns.md:52 — "Project uses existing Vite/TypeScript conventions" inside an otherwise-fully-migrated typescript-bun block. Real category (c) stale match. Fixed in follow-up commit b1c966a ("SvelteKit/TypeScript conventions (prettier-plugin-svelte + eslint-plugin-svelte)").
2. Formal completion note with full grep output + classifications was never filed as bead evidence. Acceptance clauses (1) and (2) were silently unmet.

THIS BEAD ACCEPTANCE IS NOW SATISFIED by b1c966a (stale match fixed) + this evidence note (classification written).

BLOCKER NOTE: Stage 4 bead 51 (final spec consistency audit) runs a superset sweep and would have caught concerns.md:52 at release time. Fixing it now during Stage 2 prevents a late-stage block.
summary: REJECT-then-fixed: sweep missed concerns.md:52 Vite leftover + never wrote the formal completion note; both addressed in follow-up commit b1c966a

body:
Sweep command: grep -riE "(react|vite|tanstack|react-router|minisearch|MSW)" docs/ library/ website/ CLAUDE.md README.md cli/cmd/CLAUDE.md

CATEGORY (a) historical/superseded-OK (~75 matches):
- docs/helix/06-iterate/alignment-reviews/AR-*.md (17 files) — all have "Historical" note at top from Stage 1.12
- docs/helix/02-design/plan-2026-04-04.md — historical migration plan
- docs/helix/03-test/test-plans/TP-002-server-web-ui.md — historical test plan
- docs/helix/02-design/adr/ADR-005-local-first-beads-ui.md — superseded by ADR-002 v2 with single-paragraph explanation
- docs/resources/spec-driven.md — React used as generic "what LLMs should not reach for" example, unchanged for years

CATEGORY (b) intentional-with-justification-OK (~50 matches):
- docs/helix/02-design/solution-designs/SD-022-gql-svelte-migration.md — migration north-star, deliberately names what is being replaced; pre-filed allowlist note on this bead from opus review of SD-022 (dfd4af5)
- docs/plan-svelte-migration.md — Stage 1 execution plan, same deliberate naming
- docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-008-web-ui.md:706 — "Playwright for testing (no MSW)" negative assertion, intentional
- library/environments/vagrant/ai-development-vm/provision.sh:108 — "create-react-app" preset in unrelated VM tooling, not DDx frontend
- library/mcp-servers/servers/notion.yml — false positive on "react" substring inside other words

CATEGORY (c) stale-MUST-FIX (1 match, now fixed):
- docs/helix/01-frame/concerns.md:52 — "Project uses existing Vite/TypeScript conventions" — FIXED in follow-up commit b1c966a

VERDICT: zero category (c) matches remain. Acceptance criterion 3 satisfied. Sweep complete.
summary: Full grep sweep output with per-match classifications — acceptance clauses 1+2 fulfilled
